tasks.name: PM-OS Morning Triage
tasks.description: Automated daily morning triage - scans Teams, Glean, JIRA for overnight activity and produces prioritized action report

execution.command: Run /pm-morning for today. Write report and drafts.

tasks.name: PM-OS JIRA Monitor
tasks.description: Automated JIRA/Confluence monitoring - tracks ticket status changes, new comments, and sprint progress

execution.command: Run /pm-jira for today. Write report and drafts.

tasks.name: PM-OS Weekly Email
tasks.description: Automated weekly summary email for ELT - synthesizes week activity into executive briefing

execution.command: Run /pm-weekly for this week. Write report and drafts.

tasks.name: PM-OS Pulse Reminder
tasks.description: Biweekly reminder to fill Oracle Pulse NPS survey

execution.command: Notify user: Time to fill Oracle Pulse NPS survey. Run /pm-pulse when ready.
